winner: Why did the pumpkin start hula dancing at the spray paint party? Because it wanted to become a gourd-geous work of art!

candidates.text: Why did the pumpkin start hula dancing at the spray paint party? Because it wanted to become a gourd-geous work of art!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative pun on 'gourd-geous' with good use of required words, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why was the pumpkin feeling a bit down? Because it got a spray tan and now everyone thinks it's a squash.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke uses both required words naturally and includes a play on words with 'spray tan' and 'squash.' It is concise and somewhat surprising, though the humor is mild and could be more impactful."}

candidates.text: Why was the pumpkin arrested at the car wash? Because it was caught spray-pump-kin!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses the required words and has a play on 'spray-paint' with 'spray-pumpkin,' which is somewhat clever. However, it lacks originality and the pun is predictable, reducing its overall humor impact."}

candidates.text: Why don't pumpkins ever win at a spray game? Because they always chicken out when it comes to the pump-spray!
Why did the pumpkin refuse to go to the dance? Because it was afraid of getting sprayed by a squash sprayer!
